_comment: ALIR 2025 pinned values (prime rule 3) — hand-pinned at the stage-2 stop, never emitted by the pipeline under test. endpoints are hero (Daffodil) minus ref (Max) from OFFICIAL results: corrected (118842-97376)/60=357.77 min, elapsed (114702-93650)/60=350.87, pace 357.7667/207*100=172.83 min/100nm. vmc.hero_mean_kt basis is DTF-AT-THE-GUN on the ROUTED polyline (205.80 nm at Daffodil's 12:25 EDT gun position) / official elapsed 31.8617 h = 6.459 kt — NOT the official 207.0 (I14 routed basis; that would claim 6.497). finstrip_count 0 = no finish-spread strip: ALIR's largest in-division cluster is 3 boats, the heuristic never fires, and the harness skips the strip check for a zero count. distspeed.hero = payload sailedNm/avgKt for Daffodil, sanity-checked by hand (233.9 nm / 31.8617 h = 7.34 kt). module_canaries.door: enter = first 15-min grid point with routed DTF <= 15 nm (14:30 EDT Fri), hours = official finish (20:16:42 EDT) - enter = 5.78 h; finishers 43; asserted by tests/extra.cjs against the RENDERED door trace. expected_checks 16 = 13 fixture checks + 3 extra.cjs checks.
